TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal i Taywan == Notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal i Taywan, masowal o Formosa a sowal (Inkiris: Formosan languages), o adihayay kasasiiked a pipolong a sowal i notimolan kanatal sowal no finacadan i Taywan, polong no tamdaw salongan ira ko 20 'ofad , milesap i sa'etal no yincuminco i Taywan, o kalosowal o sowal no kitakit i Taywan, o sowal no Tao ko polongan a sowal no Taywan yincuminco, manga'ay siikeden ko ka'amisay notimolan kanatal sowal no finacadan i Taywan, Cou, Ngudradrekai, Payuan, Pinuyumayan, Bunun ato pasawaliay no Taywan a notimolan kanatal sowal no finacadan a sowal, o kasasiroma no pisa'osi, salongan ira ko 20 tanfasa 30 ko sowal . O notimolan kanatal sowal no finacadan saheto o awaayay ko tilid i 'ayaw, anini ira to ko nano tilid no Roma ko patodongan a tilid, o saka sasowal tono ina a sowal salongan ira ko 18 'ofad a tamdaw(padetek 1) Roma sato, o maro'ay itini i Lanyu a Tao finacadan, talacowa milecad to i Taywanay yincumin a finacadan, citodong to sowal no itiniay Taywan finacadan a sowal no Tao a sowal, nika o nisowalan no Tao masiiked itiniay i Polynesia finacadan a badan finacadan, caayay ko no notimolan kanatal sowal no finacadan i Taywan, kona caay patodongen itini a kamok. Sacisowal sa ko no Dipong o Takasago finacadan sowal saan. Notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal i Taywan polong no nano sowal i nitimolan ira ko nika tadamaan, itiyaay notimolan kanatal a sowal malesap i kasa'etal a pinanowan, pinalengaw, manengneng i kasasireoma no sekal ato kafafalic no romi'ad, onini pahapinang to notimolan kanatal sowal i Taywan o matelangan cira. Pakayni i sowal a pikingkiw mapasadak ko parana'an, ngalef adihayay a sowal mikingkiway paso'elin o "laloma'an no to'as" no timolan finacadan ko Taywan. Taywan yincuminco wuyinhuy a pipa'ayaw to Taywan yincuminco ato notimolan kanatal sowal finacadan a kakiharan pahapinang "Taywan yincuminco o nano notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan… o notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan o sadadahalay itini i hekal a finacadan; masiiked i kasa'etal i ka'etip o kawali katimol no Africa a Madagascar kanatal, milakec to Intoyang tangasa i Easter (piliyawan ma'orip) kanatal; ka'amis o Taywan, talatimol o New Zealand, o Taywan o saka'amisay a notimolan sowal finacadan a masiiked". Lalengawan O yincumin no Taywan ato Filipin, Intonisiya kasakanatal a yincumin saheto o nano notimolan sowal a finacadan a kakiharan. Onini nai 'ayawan to'ek likisi no Taywan mafolaway a sowal o nika lalen a malecad no kasa'etal. No ka;ayaway a nisowalan, halo sowal no Micronesia, pasatomol, tenokan no katimol kanatal, kaetipay Siciniya a kitakit . Taywan satakaraway kingkiwyin (1996) paratoh: "Notimolan kanatal sowal roma sowal o Malay-Polynesian sowal (Malay-Polynesian), polong no hekal itiniay i kanatal a masafelaway a sowal finacadan". Satakaraway kingkiwyin Tangafolan ponka tilid calay pasowal to, "Ma'oripay i Taywan a yincuminco, oya Tangafolan ato Kozanzoku, o saka sasowal nangra, manga'ayay saka sasowal makakihar, matiya o itiraay i Taypinyang, Intoyang a kasakanatalay adihayay a sowal a sangasaw, matiya o nisowalan no mikingkiway a sowal 'notimolan kanatay a sowal' ato " . Kasasiiked a sangasaw O niyaro' no notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal ko Taywan So'elin to, sa'aloman sato ko katadamaan no hakasi patalahekal notimolan kanatal a sowal I Taaywan. Mikingkiwan no hakasi a sowal no notimolan kanatal o tato'asan kamaro'an ko Taywan, ngalef o lalengawan no to'asay notimolan kanatal a finacadan ko Taywan saan (nengneng Blust 1985；Bellwood 1991). Taer (Dahl 1976) paratatenga notimolan kanatay sowal i Taywan mana'ang ko adihayay tadamaanay notimolan kanatal a sowal, o cecay no polong notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal. Tonini a parana'an, Payles (Blus 1982) pa'ayaw palasepat to ca'ang to notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal: Tayal finacadan, Cou finacadan, Payuan finacadan, ato Malay – Polynesian finacadan. Ikoray to pikingkiw no Payles (Blus 1999) midotoc to ngiha, o nano Payuan finacadan a cecay ca'ang pasiikedan to, oya notimolan kanatal finacadan pala mo'etep piiked: Tayal finacadan, kaetip ka'amis finacadan, kaetip dafdaf finacadan, Cou finacadan, Ngudradrekai finacadan, Payuan finacadan, Pinuyumayan finacadan, Bunun finacadan, kawaliay no Taywan notimolan kanatal finawlan, ato Malay – Polynesian finacadan . Mo'etepay notimolan kanatal finacadan a siwaay saheto itiniay i Taywan, roma itiraay i kasa kanatal no Taypinyang to awiday no 1000 a notimolan kanatal finacadan malecaday sowal a finacadan, mahapinang itiniay i notimolan kanatal a finawlan a likisi i, o Taywan iraay i notimolan kanatal a finacadan a maro'ay, sa'ayaway kahiceraan a sa'etal. Sowal matisil I 2009 miheca, midotoc to paini no Linhoko kiwiko ponka sakapot, o Basai sowal, Ketagalan sowal, Maowushu sowal a 7 finacadan o awaayay to; roma, Kavalan sowal, Thao sowal a 7 finacadan o mamalasawad to, o Saiyan finacadan sowal o tadancaay to, o Atayal sowal, Pinuyumayan sowal, Bunun sowal a 9 finacadan a sowal malotayay to . Ono kitakit nisetekan sowal no yincuminco Caayayho kapangangan a sowal no yincuminco Salongan Notimolan kanatal a sowal no Taywan mana'ang i to'asan no notimolan kanatal finacadan a ponka ko tadamaan. Salalan no sakingiha i, saadihayay sowal limaay ko wina no ngiha, sadama ngiha masapinangay, caay ka sasifod; ira ko karatengay kahemaway, nika awaay ko no kowaping a ngiha. Masongila' ko silsil no sowal, o cecay no sasowal ato adihayay a sowal masakapot, adihay ko kasangiha . Itini i sasowalan, notimolay kanatal a sowal satadamaanay a salongan misarocoday, o nianan koya materekay a nga'ayay no notimolan kanatal a sowal, o nian koya notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal i Taywan. Oya salongan misarocoday, o pi'eses to kasasowal ato kasalikel a mahapinang ko sapasowal no patodongan . Sasowalan O kalosowal ato notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal itini i laeno, ato mingataay to notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal a Badan finacadan a Tao sowal ato Ibadan sowal a sasowalan kasasitiri', oyanan a notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal mateli sa'ayaway, o nian ko kasasotiri'an . Paheciay ^ 根據Ethnologue: Languages of the World (2022)的資料. 3,800人. Pawa'ayan ^ Blust, R. (1999). "Subgrouping, circularity and extinction: some issues in Austronesian comparative linguistics" in E. Zeitoun & P.J.K Li Selected papers from the Eighth International Conference on Austronesian Linguistics (pp. 31-94). Taipei: Academia Sinica. ^ 李壬癸. The internal relationships of Formosan languages . 2006 (2019-07-17). ( 2009-01-14). ^ Robert Blust. 1999. Subgrouping, Circularity and Extinction: Some issues in Austronesian comparative linguistics. In Elizabeth Zeitoun and Paul Jen-kuei Li (eds.), Selected papers from the Eighth International Conference on Austronesian Linguistics, 1-54. Taipei, Taiwan: Academia Sinica. ^ 2016-09-22) (中文 ). ^ 因iso . ^ 因iso ,2001 ^ 何大安,楊秀芳,2000
S.PHON: == no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ i tajwan == no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ i tajwan, maso~uwaɾ o~u fo~urmo~usa a so~uwaɾ (inkiris: fo~urmo~usan ɾaŋo~u~ua*əs), o~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj kasasiikəɬ~ɮ a pipo~uɾo~uŋ a so~uwaɾ i no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ , miɾəsap i saʡətaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i tajwan, o~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ o~u so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit i tajwan, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u tao~u ko~u po~uɾo~uŋan a so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, maŋaʡaj siikəɬ~ɮən ko~u kaʡamisaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan, ʦo~uo~u~u, ŋo~u~uɬ~ɮraɬ~ɮrəkai, pajo~u~uan, pino~u~ujo~u~umajan, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un ato~u pasawaɾiaj no~u tajwan a no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ, o~u kasasiro~uma no~u pisaʡo~usi, saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u ** tanfasa ** ko~u so~uwaɾ . o~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan saħəto~u o~u awaajaj ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ʡajaw, anini ira to~u ko~u nano~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ro~uma ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u saka saso~uwaɾ to~uno~u ina a so~uwaɾ saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw(paɬ~ɮətək *) ro~uma sato~u, o~u maro~uʡaj itini i ɾanjo~u~u a tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, taɾaʦo~uwa miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u i tajwanaj jinʦo~u~umin a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u itiniaj tajwan finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ no~u tao~u a so~uwaɾ, nika o~u niso~uwaɾan no~u tao~u masiikəɬ~ɮ itiniaj i po~uɾjnəsia finaʦaɬ~ɮan a b~b~vaɬ~ɮan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʦaajaj ko~u no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan, ko~una ʦaaj pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən itini a kamo~uk. saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u takasa*o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan so~uwaɾ saan. no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ i tajwan po~uɾo~uŋ no~u nano~u so~uwaɾ i nitimo~uɾan ira ko~u nika taɬ~ɮamaan, itijaaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ maɾəsap i kasaʡətaɾ a pinano~uwan, pinaɾəŋaw, manəŋnəŋ i kasasirəo~uma no~u səkaɾ ato~u kafafaɾiʦ no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~unini paħapinaŋ to~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ i tajwan o~u matəɾaŋan ʦira. pakajni i so~uwaɾ a pikiŋkiw mapasaɬ~ɮak ko~u paranaʡan, ŋaɾəf aɬ~ɮiħajaj a so~uwaɾ mikiŋkiwaj paso~uʡəɾin o~u "ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u to~uʡas" no~u timo~uɾan finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u tajwan. tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u wo~u~ujinħo~u~uj a pipaʡajaw to~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ato~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a kakiħaran paħapinaŋ "tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u o~u nano~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan* o~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u saɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaj itini i ħəkaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan; masiikəɬ~ɮ i kasaʡətaɾ i kaʡətip o~u kawaɾi katimo~uɾ no~u afriʦa a maɬ~ɮa*asʦar kanataɾ, miɾakəʦ to~u into~ujaŋ taŋasa i əastər (piɾijawan maʡo~urip) kanataɾ; kaʡamis o~u tajwan, taɾatimo~uɾ o~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u tajwan o~u sakaʡamisaj a no~utimo~uɾan so~uwaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a masiikəɬ~ɮ". ɾaɾəŋawan o~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u tajwan ato~u fiɾipin, into~unisija kasakanataɾ a jinʦo~u~umin saħəto~u o~u nano~u no~utimo~uɾan so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a kakiħaran. o~unini nai ʡajawan to~uʡək ɾikisi no~u tajwan mafo~uɾawaj a so~uwaɾ o~u nika ɾaɾən a maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ no~u kasaʡətaɾ. no~u ka;ajawaj a niso~uwaɾan, ħaɾo~u so~uwaɾ no~u miʦro~unəsia, pasato~umo~uɾ, təno~ukan no~u katimo~uɾ kanataɾ, kaətipaj siʦinija a kitakit . tajwan satakarawaj kiŋkiwjin (****) parato~uħ: "no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ ro~uma so~uwaɾ o~u maɾaj-po~uɾjnəsian so~uwaɾ (maɾaj-po~uɾjnəsian), po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ itiniaj i kanataɾ a masafəɾawaj a so~uwaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan". satakarawaj kiŋkiwjin taŋafo~uɾan po~unka tiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦaɾaj paso~uwaɾ to~u, "maʡo~uripaj i tajwan a jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, o~uja taŋafo~uɾan ato~u ko~u*an*o~uko~u~u, o~u saka saso~uwaɾ naŋra, maŋaʡajaj saka saso~uwaɾ makakiħar, matija o~u itiraaj i tajpinjaŋ, into~ujaŋ a kasakanataɾaj aɬ~ɮiħajaj a so~uwaɾ a saŋasaw, matija o~u niso~uwaɾan no~u mikiŋkiwaj a so~uwaɾ ʡno~utimo~uɾan kanataj a so~uwaɾʡ ato~u " . kasasiikəɬ~ɮ a saŋasaw o~u nijaro~uʡ no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ ko~u tajwan so~uʡəɾin to~u, saʡaɾo~uman sato~u ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u ħakasi pataɾaħəkaɾ no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ i taajwan. mikiŋkiwan no~u ħakasi a so~uwaɾ no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ o~u tato~uʡasan kamaro~uʡan ko~u tajwan, ŋaɾəf o~u ɾaɾəŋawan no~u to~uʡasaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u tajwan saan (nəŋnəŋ b~b~vɾo~u~ust *****b~b~vəɾɾwo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ****). taər (ɬ~ɮaħɾ ****) paratatəŋa no~utimo~uɾan kanataj so~uwaɾ i tajwan manaʡaŋ ko~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ, o~u ʦəʦaj no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ. to~unini a paranaʡan, pajɾəs (b~b~vɾo~u~us ****) paʡajaw paɾasəpat to~u ʦaʡaŋ to~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ: tajaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʦo~uo~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pajo~u~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ato~u maɾaj * po~uɾjnəsian finaʦaɬ~ɮan. iko~uraj to~u pikiŋkiw no~u pajɾəs (b~b~vɾo~u~us ****) miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ŋiħa, o~u nano~u pajo~u~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ʦəʦaj ʦaʡaŋ pasiikəɬ~ɮan to~u, o~uja no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan paɾa mo~uʡətəp piikəɬ~ɮ: tajaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan, kaətip kaʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, kaətip ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʦo~uo~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ŋo~u~uɬ~ɮraɬ~ɮrəkai finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pajo~u~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pino~u~ujo~u~umajan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un finaʦaɬ~ɮan, kawaɾiaj no~u tajwan no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finawɾan, ato~u maɾaj * po~uɾjnəsian finaʦaɬ~ɮan . mo~uʡətəpaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a siwaaj saħəto~u itiniaj i tajwan, ro~uma itiraaj i kasa kanataɾ no~u tajpinjaŋ to~u awiɬ~ɮaj no~u **** a no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, maħapinaŋ itiniaj i no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a finawɾan a ɾikisi i, o~u tajwan iraaj i no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a maro~uʡaj, saʡajawaj kaħiʦəraan a saʡətaɾ. so~uwaɾ matisiɾ i **** miħəʦa, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u paini no~u ɾinħo~uko~u kiwiko~u po~unka sakapo~ut, o~u b~b~vasai so~uwaɾ, kəta*aɾan so~uwaɾ, mao~uwo~u~usħo~u~u so~uwaɾ a * finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u awaajaj to~u; ro~uma, kab~vaɾan so~uwaɾ, tħao~u so~uwaɾ a * finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u mamaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u, o~u saijan finaʦaɬ~ɮan so~uwaɾ o~u taɬ~ɮanʦaaj to~u, o~u atajaɾ so~uwaɾ, pino~u~ujo~u~umajan so~uwaɾ, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un so~uwaɾ a * finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ maɾo~utajaj to~u . o~uno~u kitakit nisətəkan so~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ʦaajajħo~u kapaŋaŋan a so~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋan no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan manaʡaŋ i to~uʡasan no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a po~unka ko~u taɬ~ɮamaan. saɾaɾan no~u sakiŋiħa i, saaɬ~ɮiħajaj so~uwaɾ ɾimaaj ko~u wina no~u ŋiħa, saɬ~ɮama ŋiħa masapinaŋaj, ʦaaj ka sasifo~uɬ~ɮ; ira ko~u karatəŋaj kaħəmawaj, nika awaaj ko~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ a ŋiħa. maso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u siɾsiɾ no~u so~uwaɾ, o~u ʦəʦaj no~u saso~uwaɾ ato~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj a so~uwaɾ masakapo~ut, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kasaŋiħa . itini i saso~uwaɾan, no~utimo~uɾaj kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ sataɬ~ɮamaanaj a saɾo~uŋan misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj, o~u nianan ko~uja matərəkaj a ŋaʡajaj no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ, o~u nian ko~uja no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ i tajwan. o~uja saɾo~uŋan misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj, o~u piʡəsəs to~u kasaso~uwaɾ ato~u kasaɾikəɾ a maħapinaŋ ko~u sapaso~uwaɾ no~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan . saso~uwaɾan o~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ ato~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ itini i ɾaəno~u, ato~u miŋataaj to~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ a b~b~vaɬ~ɮan finaʦaɬ~ɮan a tao~u so~uwaɾ ato~u ib~b~vaɬ~ɮan so~uwaɾ a saso~uwaɾan kasasitiriʡ, o~ujanan a no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ matəɾi saʡajawaj, o~u nian ko~u kasaso~utiriʡan . paħəʦiaj ʔ **ətħno~uɾo~u*o~u~uə: ɾaŋo~u~ua*əs o~uf tħə wo~urɾɬ~ɮ (****)***. *,****. pawaʡajan ʔ b~b~vɾo~u~ust, r. (****). "so~u~ub~b~v*ro~uo~u~upiŋ, ʦirʦo~u~uɾaritj anɬ~ɮ əxtinʦtio~un: so~umə isso~u~uəs in ao~u~ustro~unəsian ʦo~umparatib~və ɾiŋo~u~uistiʦs" in ə. *əito~uo~u~un & p.*.k ɾi səɾəʦtəɬ~ɮ papərs fro~um tħə əi*ħtħ intərnatio~unaɾ ʦo~unfərənʦə o~un ao~u~ustro~unəsian ɾiŋo~u~uistiʦs (pp. **-**). taipəi: aʦaɬ~ɮəmia siniʦa. ʔ ***. tħə intərnaɾ rəɾatio~unsħips o~uf fo~urmo~usan ɾaŋo~u~ua*əs . **** (****-**-**). ( ****-**-**). ʔ ro~ub~b~vərt b~b~vɾo~u~ust. ****. so~u~ub~b~v*ro~uo~u~upiŋ, ʦirʦo~u~uɾaritj anɬ~ɮ əxtinʦtio~un: so~umə isso~u~uəs in ao~u~ustro~unəsian ʦo~umparatib~və ɾiŋo~u~uistiʦs. in əɾi*ab~b~vətħ *əito~uo~u~un anɬ~ɮ pao~u~uɾ *ən-ko~u~uəi ɾi (əɬ~ɮs.), səɾəʦtəɬ~ɮ papərs fro~um tħə əi*ħtħ intərnatio~unaɾ ʦo~unfərənʦə o~un ao~u~ustro~unəsian ɾiŋo~u~uistiʦs, *-**. taipəi, taiwan: aʦaɬ~ɮəmia siniʦa. ʔ ****-**-**) (** ). ʔ *iso~u . ʔ *iso~u ,**** ʔ ***,***,****
S.FORM: == Notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal i Taywan == Notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal i Taywan, masowal o Formosa a sowal (Inkiris: Formosan languages), o adihayay kasasiiked a pipolong a sowal i notimolan kanatal sowal no finacadan i Taywan, polong no tamdaw salongan ira ko 20 'ofad , milesap i sa'etal no yincuminco i Taywan, o kalosowal o sowal no kitakit i Taywan, o sowal no Tao ko polongan a sowal no Taywan yincuminco, manga'ay siikeden ko ka'amisay notimolan kanatal sowal no finacadan i Taywan, Cou, Ngudradrekai, Payuan, Pinuyumayan, Bunun ato pasawaliay no Taywan a notimolan kanatal sowal no finacadan a sowal, o kasasiroma no pisa'osi, salongan ira ko 20 tanfasa 30 ko sowal . O notimolan kanatal sowal no finacadan saheto o awaayay ko tilid i 'ayaw, anini ira to ko nano tilid no Roma ko patodongan a tilid, o saka sasowal tono ina a sowal salongan ira ko 18 'ofad a tamdaw(padetek 1) Roma sato, o maro'ay itini i Lanyu a Tao finacadan, talacowa milecad to i Taywanay yincumin a finacadan, citodong to sowal no itiniay Taywan finacadan a sowal no Tao a sowal, nika o nisowalan no Tao masiiked itiniay i Polynesia finacadan a badan finacadan, caayay ko no notimolan kanatal sowal no finacadan i Taywan, kona caay patodongen itini a kamok. Sacisowal sa ko no Dipong o Takasago finacadan sowal saan. Notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal i Taywan polong no nano sowal i nitimolan ira ko nika tadamaan, itiyaay notimolan kanatal a sowal malesap i kasa'etal a pinanowan, pinalengaw, manengneng i kasasireoma no sekal ato kafafalic no romi'ad, onini pahapinang to notimolan kanatal sowal i Taywan o matelangan cira. Pakayni i sowal a pikingkiw mapasadak ko parana'an, ngalef adihayay a sowal mikingkiway paso'elin o "laloma'an no to'as" no timolan finacadan ko Taywan. Taywan yincuminco wuyinhuy a pipa'ayaw to Taywan yincuminco ato notimolan kanatal sowal finacadan a kakiharan pahapinang "Taywan yincuminco o nano notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan… o notimolan kanatal sowal a finacadan o sadadahalay itini i hekal a finacadan; masiiked i kasa'etal i ka'etip o kawali katimol no Africa a Madagascar kanatal, milakec to Intoyang tangasa i Easter (piliyawan ma'orip) kanatal; ka'amis o Taywan, talatimol o New Zealand, o Taywan o saka'amisay a notimolan sowal finacadan a masiiked". Lalengawan O yincumin no Taywan ato Filipin, Intonisiya kasakanatal a yincumin saheto o nano notimolan sowal a finacadan a kakiharan. Onini nai 'ayawan to'ek likisi no Taywan mafolaway a sowal o nika lalen a malecad no kasa'etal. No ka;ayaway a nisowalan, halo sowal no Micronesia, pasatomol, tenokan no katimol kanatal, kaetipay Siciniya a kitakit . Taywan satakaraway kingkiwyin (1996) paratoh: "Notimolan kanatal sowal roma sowal o Malay-Polynesian sowal (Malay-Polynesian), polong no hekal itiniay i kanatal a masafelaway a sowal finacadan". Satakaraway kingkiwyin Tangafolan ponka tilid calay pasowal to, "Ma'oripay i Taywan a yincuminco, oya Tangafolan ato Kozanzoku, o saka sasowal nangra, manga'ayay saka sasowal makakihar, matiya o itiraay i Taypinyang, Intoyang a kasakanatalay adihayay a sowal a sangasaw, matiya o nisowalan no mikingkiway a sowal 'notimolan kanatay a sowal' ato " . Kasasiiked a sangasaw O niyaro' no notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal ko Taywan So'elin to, sa'aloman sato ko katadamaan no hakasi patalahekal notimolan kanatal a sowal I Taaywan. Mikingkiwan no hakasi a sowal no notimolan kanatal o tato'asan kamaro'an ko Taywan, ngalef o lalengawan no to'asay notimolan kanatal a finacadan ko Taywan saan (nengneng Blust 1985；Bellwood 1991). Taer (Dahl 1976) paratatenga notimolan kanatay sowal i Taywan mana'ang ko adihayay tadamaanay notimolan kanatal a sowal, o cecay no polong notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal. Tonini a parana'an, Payles (Blus 1982) pa'ayaw palasepat to ca'ang to notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal: Tayal finacadan, Cou finacadan, Payuan finacadan, ato Malay – Polynesian finacadan. Ikoray to pikingkiw no Payles (Blus 1999) midotoc to ngiha, o nano Payuan finacadan a cecay ca'ang pasiikedan to, oya notimolan kanatal finacadan pala mo'etep piiked: Tayal finacadan, kaetip ka'amis finacadan, kaetip dafdaf finacadan, Cou finacadan, Ngudradrekai finacadan, Payuan finacadan, Pinuyumayan finacadan, Bunun finacadan, kawaliay no Taywan notimolan kanatal finawlan, ato Malay – Polynesian finacadan . Mo'etepay notimolan kanatal finacadan a siwaay saheto itiniay i Taywan, roma itiraay i kasa kanatal no Taypinyang to awiday no 1000 a notimolan kanatal finacadan malecaday sowal a finacadan, mahapinang itiniay i notimolan kanatal a finawlan a likisi i, o Taywan iraay i notimolan kanatal a finacadan a maro'ay, sa'ayaway kahiceraan a sa'etal. Sowal matisil I 2009 miheca, midotoc to paini no Linhoko kiwiko ponka sakapot, o Basai sowal, Ketagalan sowal, Maowushu sowal a 7 finacadan o awaayay to; roma, Kavalan sowal, Thao sowal a 7 finacadan o mamalasawad to, o Saiyan finacadan sowal o tadancaay to, o Atayal sowal, Pinuyumayan sowal, Bunun sowal a 9 finacadan a sowal malotayay to . Ono kitakit nisetekan sowal no yincuminco Caayayho kapangangan a sowal no yincuminco Salongan Notimolan kanatal a sowal no Taywan mana'ang i to'asan no notimolan kanatal finacadan a ponka ko tadamaan. Salalan no sakingiha i, saadihayay sowal limaay ko wina no ngiha, sadama ngiha masapinangay, caay ka sasifod; ira ko karatengay kahemaway, nika awaay ko no kowaping a ngiha. Masongila' ko silsil no sowal, o cecay no sasowal ato adihayay a sowal masakapot, adihay ko kasangiha . Itini i sasowalan, notimolay kanatal a sowal satadamaanay a salongan misarocoday, o nianan koya materekay a nga'ayay no notimolan kanatal a sowal, o nian koya notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal i Taywan. Oya salongan misarocoday, o pi'eses to kasasowal ato kasalikel a mahapinang ko sapasowal no patodongan . Sasowalan O kalosowal ato notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal itini i laeno, ato mingataay to notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal a Badan finacadan a Tao sowal ato Ibadan sowal a sasowalan kasasitiri', oyanan a notimolan kanatal finacadan a sowal mateli sa'ayaway, o nian ko kasasotiri'an . Paheciay ^ 根據Ethnologue: Languages of the World (2022)的資料. 3,800人. Pawa'ayan ^ Blust, R. (1999). "Subgrouping, circularity and extinction: some issues in Austronesian comparative linguistics" in E. Zeitoun & P.J.K Li Selected papers from the Eighth International Conference on Austronesian Linguistics (pp. 31-94). Taipei: Academia Sinica. ^ 李壬癸. The internal relationships of Formosan languages . 2006 (2019-07-17). ( 2009-01-14). ^ Robert Blust. 1999. Subgrouping, Circularity and Extinction: Some issues in Austronesian comparative linguistics. In Elizabeth Zeitoun and Paul Jen-kuei Li (eds.), Selected papers from the Eighth International Conference on Austronesian Linguistics, 1-54. Taipei, Taiwan: Academia Sinica. ^ 2016-09-22) (中文 ). ^ 因iso . ^ 因iso ,2001 ^ 何大安,楊秀芳,2000
S.PHON: == no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ i tajwan == no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ i tajwan, maso~uwaɾ o~u fo~urmo~usa a so~uwaɾ (inkiris: fo~urmo~usan ɾaŋo~u~ua*əs), o~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj kasasiikəɬ~ɮ a pipo~uɾo~uŋ a so~uwaɾ i no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ , miɾəsap i saʡətaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i tajwan, o~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ o~u so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit i tajwan, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u tao~u ko~u po~uɾo~uŋan a so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, maŋaʡaj siikəɬ~ɮən ko~u kaʡamisaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan, ʦo~uo~u~u, ŋo~u~uɬ~ɮraɬ~ɮrəkai, pajo~u~uan, pino~u~ujo~u~umajan, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un ato~u pasawaɾiaj no~u tajwan a no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ, o~u kasasiro~uma no~u pisaʡo~usi, saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u ** tanfasa ** ko~u so~uwaɾ . o~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan saħəto~u o~u awaajaj ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ʡajaw, anini ira to~u ko~u nano~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ro~uma ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u saka saso~uwaɾ to~uno~u ina a so~uwaɾ saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw(paɬ~ɮətək *) ro~uma sato~u, o~u maro~uʡaj itini i ɾanjo~u~u a tao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, taɾaʦo~uwa miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u i tajwanaj jinʦo~u~umin a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u itiniaj tajwan finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ no~u tao~u a so~uwaɾ, nika o~u niso~uwaɾan no~u tao~u masiikəɬ~ɮ itiniaj i po~uɾjnəsia finaʦaɬ~ɮan a b~b~vaɬ~ɮan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʦaajaj ko~u no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan, ko~una ʦaaj pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən itini a kamo~uk. saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u takasa*o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan so~uwaɾ saan. no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ i tajwan po~uɾo~uŋ no~u nano~u so~uwaɾ i nitimo~uɾan ira ko~u nika taɬ~ɮamaan, itijaaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ maɾəsap i kasaʡətaɾ a pinano~uwan, pinaɾəŋaw, manəŋnəŋ i kasasirəo~uma no~u səkaɾ ato~u kafafaɾiʦ no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~unini paħapinaŋ to~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ i tajwan o~u matəɾaŋan ʦira. pakajni i so~uwaɾ a pikiŋkiw mapasaɬ~ɮak ko~u paranaʡan, ŋaɾəf aɬ~ɮiħajaj a so~uwaɾ mikiŋkiwaj paso~uʡəɾin o~u "ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u to~uʡas" no~u timo~uɾan finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u tajwan. tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u wo~u~ujinħo~u~uj a pipaʡajaw to~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ato~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a kakiħaran paħapinaŋ "tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u o~u nano~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan* o~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u saɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaj itini i ħəkaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan; masiikəɬ~ɮ i kasaʡətaɾ i kaʡətip o~u kawaɾi katimo~uɾ no~u afriʦa a maɬ~ɮa*asʦar kanataɾ, miɾakəʦ to~u into~ujaŋ taŋasa i əastər (piɾijawan maʡo~urip) kanataɾ; kaʡamis o~u tajwan, taɾatimo~uɾ o~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u tajwan o~u sakaʡamisaj a no~utimo~uɾan so~uwaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a masiikəɬ~ɮ". ɾaɾəŋawan o~u jinʦo~u~umin no~u tajwan ato~u fiɾipin, into~unisija kasakanataɾ a jinʦo~u~umin saħəto~u o~u nano~u no~utimo~uɾan so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a kakiħaran. o~unini nai ʡajawan to~uʡək ɾikisi no~u tajwan mafo~uɾawaj a so~uwaɾ o~u nika ɾaɾən a maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ no~u kasaʡətaɾ. no~u ka;ajawaj a niso~uwaɾan, ħaɾo~u so~uwaɾ no~u miʦro~unəsia, pasato~umo~uɾ, təno~ukan no~u katimo~uɾ kanataɾ, kaətipaj siʦinija a kitakit . tajwan satakarawaj kiŋkiwjin (****) parato~uħ: "no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ so~uwaɾ ro~uma so~uwaɾ o~u maɾaj-po~uɾjnəsian so~uwaɾ (maɾaj-po~uɾjnəsian), po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ itiniaj i kanataɾ a masafəɾawaj a so~uwaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan". satakarawaj kiŋkiwjin taŋafo~uɾan po~unka tiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦaɾaj paso~uwaɾ to~u, "maʡo~uripaj i tajwan a jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, o~uja taŋafo~uɾan ato~u ko~u*an*o~uko~u~u, o~u saka saso~uwaɾ naŋra, maŋaʡajaj saka saso~uwaɾ makakiħar, matija o~u itiraaj i tajpinjaŋ, into~ujaŋ a kasakanataɾaj aɬ~ɮiħajaj a so~uwaɾ a saŋasaw, matija o~u niso~uwaɾan no~u mikiŋkiwaj a so~uwaɾ ʡno~utimo~uɾan kanataj a so~uwaɾʡ ato~u " . kasasiikəɬ~ɮ a saŋasaw o~u nijaro~uʡ no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ ko~u tajwan so~uʡəɾin to~u, saʡaɾo~uman sato~u ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u ħakasi pataɾaħəkaɾ no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ i taajwan. mikiŋkiwan no~u ħakasi a so~uwaɾ no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ o~u tato~uʡasan kamaro~uʡan ko~u tajwan, ŋaɾəf o~u ɾaɾəŋawan no~u to~uʡasaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u tajwan saan (nəŋnəŋ b~b~vɾo~u~ust *****b~b~vəɾɾwo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ****). taər (ɬ~ɮaħɾ ****) paratatəŋa no~utimo~uɾan kanataj so~uwaɾ i tajwan manaʡaŋ ko~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ, o~u ʦəʦaj no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ. to~unini a paranaʡan, pajɾəs (b~b~vɾo~u~us ****) paʡajaw paɾasəpat to~u ʦaʡaŋ to~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ: tajaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʦo~uo~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pajo~u~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ato~u maɾaj * po~uɾjnəsian finaʦaɬ~ɮan. iko~uraj to~u pikiŋkiw no~u pajɾəs (b~b~vɾo~u~us ****) miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ŋiħa, o~u nano~u pajo~u~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ʦəʦaj ʦaʡaŋ pasiikəɬ~ɮan to~u, o~uja no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan paɾa mo~uʡətəp piikəɬ~ɮ: tajaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan, kaətip kaʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, kaətip ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʦo~uo~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ŋo~u~uɬ~ɮraɬ~ɮrəkai finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pajo~u~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pino~u~ujo~u~umajan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un finaʦaɬ~ɮan, kawaɾiaj no~u tajwan no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finawɾan, ato~u maɾaj * po~uɾjnəsian finaʦaɬ~ɮan . mo~uʡətəpaj no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a siwaaj saħəto~u itiniaj i tajwan, ro~uma itiraaj i kasa kanataɾ no~u tajpinjaŋ to~u awiɬ~ɮaj no~u **** a no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj so~uwaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, maħapinaŋ itiniaj i no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a finawɾan a ɾikisi i, o~u tajwan iraaj i no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a maro~uʡaj, saʡajawaj kaħiʦəraan a saʡətaɾ. so~uwaɾ matisiɾ i **** miħəʦa, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u paini no~u ɾinħo~uko~u kiwiko~u po~unka sakapo~ut, o~u b~b~vasai so~uwaɾ, kəta*aɾan so~uwaɾ, mao~uwo~u~usħo~u~u so~uwaɾ a * finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u awaajaj to~u; ro~uma, kab~vaɾan so~uwaɾ, tħao~u so~uwaɾ a * finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u mamaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u, o~u saijan finaʦaɬ~ɮan so~uwaɾ o~u taɬ~ɮanʦaaj to~u, o~u atajaɾ so~uwaɾ, pino~u~ujo~u~umajan so~uwaɾ, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un so~uwaɾ a * finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ maɾo~utajaj to~u . o~uno~u kitakit nisətəkan so~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ʦaajajħo~u kapaŋaŋan a so~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋan no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan manaʡaŋ i to~uʡasan no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a po~unka ko~u taɬ~ɮamaan. saɾaɾan no~u sakiŋiħa i, saaɬ~ɮiħajaj so~uwaɾ ɾimaaj ko~u wina no~u ŋiħa, saɬ~ɮama ŋiħa masapinaŋaj, ʦaaj ka sasifo~uɬ~ɮ; ira ko~u karatəŋaj kaħəmawaj, nika awaaj ko~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ a ŋiħa. maso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u siɾsiɾ no~u so~uwaɾ, o~u ʦəʦaj no~u saso~uwaɾ ato~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj a so~uwaɾ masakapo~ut, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kasaŋiħa . itini i saso~uwaɾan, no~utimo~uɾaj kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ sataɬ~ɮamaanaj a saɾo~uŋan misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj, o~u nianan ko~uja matərəkaj a ŋaʡajaj no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ, o~u nian ko~uja no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ i tajwan. o~uja saɾo~uŋan misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj, o~u piʡəsəs to~u kasaso~uwaɾ ato~u kasaɾikəɾ a maħapinaŋ ko~u sapaso~uwaɾ no~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan . saso~uwaɾan o~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ ato~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ itini i ɾaəno~u, ato~u miŋataaj to~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ a b~b~vaɬ~ɮan finaʦaɬ~ɮan a tao~u so~uwaɾ ato~u ib~b~vaɬ~ɮan so~uwaɾ a saso~uwaɾan kasasitiriʡ, o~ujanan a no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ matəɾi saʡajawaj, o~u nian ko~u kasaso~utiriʡan . paħəʦiaj ʔ **ətħno~uɾo~u*o~u~uə: ɾaŋo~u~ua*əs o~uf tħə wo~urɾɬ~ɮ (****)***. *,****. pawaʡajan ʔ b~b~vɾo~u~ust, r. (****). "so~u~ub~b~v*ro~uo~u~upiŋ, ʦirʦo~u~uɾaritj anɬ~ɮ əxtinʦtio~un: so~umə isso~u~uəs in ao~u~ustro~unəsian ʦo~umparatib~və ɾiŋo~u~uistiʦs" in ə. *əito~uo~u~un & p.*.k ɾi səɾəʦtəɬ~ɮ papərs fro~um tħə əi*ħtħ intərnatio~unaɾ ʦo~unfərənʦə o~un ao~u~ustro~unəsian ɾiŋo~u~uistiʦs (pp. **-**). taipəi: aʦaɬ~ɮəmia siniʦa. ʔ ***. tħə intərnaɾ rəɾatio~unsħips o~uf fo~urmo~usan ɾaŋo~u~ua*əs . **** (****-**-**). ( ****-**-**). ʔ ro~ub~b~vərt b~b~vɾo~u~ust. ****. so~u~ub~b~v*ro~uo~u~upiŋ, ʦirʦo~u~uɾaritj anɬ~ɮ əxtinʦtio~un: so~umə isso~u~uəs in ao~u~ustro~unəsian ʦo~umparatib~və ɾiŋo~u~uistiʦs. in əɾi*ab~b~vətħ *əito~uo~u~un anɬ~ɮ pao~u~uɾ *ən-ko~u~uəi ɾi (əɬ~ɮs.), səɾəʦtəɬ~ɮ papərs fro~um tħə əi*ħtħ intərnatio~unaɾ ʦo~unfərənʦə o~un ao~u~ustro~unəsian ɾiŋo~u~uistiʦs, *-**. taipəi, taiwan: aʦaɬ~ɮəmia siniʦa. ʔ ****-**-**) (** ). ʔ *iso~u . ʔ *iso~u ,**** ʔ ***,***,****
